content: Refactor Admin Dashboard to use canonicalData.js - remove hardcoded portfolio metrics, use PORTFOLIO_TOTALS and CANONICAL_PROPERTIES
Refactor Tenants/Residents pages to use CANONICAL_RESIDENTS and ALEX_CHEN from canonicalData.js
Refactor Properties pages to use CANONICAL_PROPERTIES from canonicalData.js
Refactor Property Detail page to use getPropertyById helper and canonical property data
Refactor Providers page to use CANONICAL_PROVIDERS from canonicalData.js
Refactor Analytics page to use PORTFOLIO_TOTALS and canonical data
Refactor Manager Dashboard and all manager pages to use canonical data
Refactor Landing Page to use canonical properties and ALEX_CHEN for demo data
Refactor Resident pages to use canonical data for services and bookings
Verify frontend compiles without errors using esbuild check
Perform comprehensive click-through test of all admin routes
Perform manual cross-page data consistency verification (Alex Chen data, property names, metrics)
